title: Ability to retrieve lost/deleted WorkForms made inside monday boards or in WorkForms Product
excerpt: February 17, 2024 - Although the deleted Forms made inside a board can be retrieved through Activity Log by clicking the undo button, I hope there’s a way to retrieve a lost/deleted WorkForm made inside monday boards or …

posts.author: LanVill (Allan Villarao)
posts.cookedHtml: February 17, 2024 - Although the deleted Forms made inside a board can be retrieved through Activity Log by clicking the undo button, I hope there’s a way to retrieve a lost/deleted WorkForm made inside monday boards or in WorkForm Product. Somewhat like a Trash/Archive section in the WorkForm Product.
